_doc: Per-family commands run BEFORE gftools-builder / fontc / fontmake, for families whose
sources must be generated or pre-compiled first.
Each command runs through the shell with:
- cwd  = the extracted upstream source tree (at the pinned commit)
- PATH = the family's build venv bin first (so fontmake / fonttools / gftools / python
resolve to the pinned build toolchain)
Commands run in order; a non-zero exit fails the family with a clear 'pre-build' error.
Only the 'rules' object is read. Keys are family slugs (e.g. 'ofl/cairoplay'). '_example'
below shows the shape and is ignored by the tool.
This file is version-controlled; edit it to register new pre-compile steps.

ofl/cairoplay.note: Cairo Play ships generated sources under sources/generated/ via a build script

ofl/cairo.note: Gue3bara/Cairo: sources/cairo.yaml builds CairoNormal.glyphs, which build.sh generates from sources/Cairo.glyphs via scripts/makenormal.py (needs glyphsLib, in the base venv).

ofl/cairoplay.note: Gue3bara/Cairo: sources/cairoplay.yaml builds CairoPlay.glyphs, which build.sh generates from sources/Cairo.glyphs via scripts/makeplay.py.

ofl/lilex.note: ofl/lilex: Pre-build script scripts/generate.py fails: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'arrrgs' (an upstream build dependency

ofl/lxgwwenkaimonotc.note: aaronbell/LxgwWenkaiTC (CJK): Makefile 'build: extract merge export' — extract.py decompresses the .ufoz archives and merge.py generates the UFO+designspace under sources/build/ that sources/project.yaml references. Heavy build.

ofl/moiraione.note: JAMO-TYPEFACE/Moirai: Sources/config.yaml references 'Moirai.glyphs' but the committed file is 'Sources/moirai.glyphs' (lowercase) — works on case-insensitive macOS, fails on Linux. Stage the correctly-cased name.

ofl/biryani.note: ofl/biryani: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (2 masters, instantiateUfo retained).

ofl/chakrapetch.note: ofl/chakrapetch: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (6 masters, instantiateUfo retained).

ofl/cinzeldecorative.note: ofl/cinzeldecorative: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (2 masters, instantiateUfo retained).

ofl/cormorantupright.note: ofl/cormorantupright: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (2 masters, instantiateUfo retained).
pre_build: mkdir -p sources && cp -a "4. Glyphs Source Files/CormorantUpright.glyphs" "sources/CormorantUpright.glyphs"

ofl/martel.note: ofl/martel: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (3 masters, instantiateUfo retained).

ofl/martelsans.note: ofl/martelsans: source path contains spaces; gftools-builder's ninja rules interpolate $in UNQUOTED, so fontmake word-splits the path at job runtime. Stage to a space-free path the override config.yaml references (2 masters, instantiateUfo retained).
pre_build: mkdir -p sources && cp -a "Martel Sans Source Files/Martel_Sans_20150305.glyphs" "sources/Martel_Sans_20150305.glyphs"

ofl/bebasneue.note: ofl/bebasneue: source filename has parentheses (shell-special in the unquoted ninja $in); stage to a clean path the override config references.

pre_build:
python3 - <<'PY'
import re,io
p='IBM-Plex-Sans-KR/sources/masters/IBM Plex Sans KR.glyphs'
s=open(p,encoding='utf-8').read()
# Neutralize designer 'off' backup layers: rename brace coord {NNN, NNNoff} so glyphsLib no longer reads them as intermediate-master locations.
s=re.sub(r'name = "([^"{]*)\{(\d+), (\d+)off\}";', r'name = "\1[\2 \3 off]";', s)
open(p,'w',encoding='utf-8').write(s)
PY
ofl/ibmplexsanskr.note: ofl/ibmplexsanskr: Source defect: glyph layers named 'Rg {400, 100off}' / '{390, 100off}' are parsed by glyphsLib as brace/intermediate-lay

pre_build:
cat > _patch_gupter.py <<'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Pin the variable-font default master to the real Regular master.
The 2 masters sit at Weight design 66 (Regular) and 108 (Bold), but the
generated designspace default lands at design 70 (the Regular *instance*),
where no master exists -> fontmake 'Default source not found!'. Adding an
'Axis Location' custom parameter to each master makes glyphsLib build the
user->design map from the masters (400->66, 700->108), so the user default
(400) resolves to the real Regular master at design 66. Master outlines are
untouched; the Regular instance stays at its interpolated design 70."""
import sys, glyphsLib
from glyphsLib.classes import GSCustomParameter
path = sys.argv[1]
f = glyphsLib.GSFont(path)
loc = {"Regular": 400, "Bold": 700}
for m in f.masters:
    if m.name in loc and not any(cp.name == "Axis Location" for cp in m.customParameters):
        m.customParameters.append(
            GSCustomParameter("Axis Location", [{"Axis": "Weight", "Location": loc[m.name]}])
        )
f.save(path)
PYEOF
ofl/gupter.note: ofl/gupter: Cohort c-516a7ac32cf5 (fontmake 3.12.1, glyphsLib 6.12.7). The cohort venv was found stripped to bare pip/setu

ofl/notosanssyriac.note: ofl/notosanssyriac: Empty prebuild_commands was the failure cause (diagnosis correct, no patch recorded). Adapted the VERIFIED cha

ofl/notosanssyriaceastern.note: ofl/notosanssyriaceastern: Empty prebuild_commands was the failure cause. Verified the changa Axes-custom-param patch works on a Glyphs3

ofl/notosansvithkuqi.note: ofl/notosansvithkuqi: Empty prebuild_commands was the failure cause. Explicit single-axis Axes custom param suppresses glyphsLib's s

ofl/notoserifvithkuqi.note: ofl/notoserifvithkuqi: Empty prebuild_commands was the failure cause. Identical degenerate-wdth class and fix as the Sans companion.
